title: Cross Guild Dreams of the One Piece
description: On pages 2–4, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, York, Marines, Kuzan, Unknown person #2, Garp as World events shift toward Cross Guild, Sabo’s account of the Levely, Cobra’s death, Imu, the Five Elders, and the Revolutionary Army’s next move.
scene: World events shift toward Cross Guild, Sabo’s account of the Levely, Cobra’s death, Imu, the Five Elders, and the Revolutionary Army’s next move.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Vice Admiral T-Bone was adored by civilians and Marines alike...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: An obituary makes the front page!

dialogue.speaker: York
dialogue.text: News of His Death shocked the world...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But the Navy refused to comment on the details of the incident.

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: navy ho

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Have they caught the man who did it?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Nope, not yet.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But we're certain the culprit's family is bound to be pretty well off after this...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What's the world coming to, Otsuru- Chan?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The civilians we're sworn to protect... are stabbing us in the back...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: It's Unbear- able.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: pirates aren't the only ones interested in money, y'know.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We Marines have bouties on our heads now...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's only natural for people to come after us.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Especially in a place like Pepe Kingdom where over a thousand die of starvation every year. It's no wonder he was killed there.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Poverty and wealth... We all adapt to our Circum- stances.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Not that I'm trying to defend the culprit, of course.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Just noting that if this is what that darn clown had in mind, we've severely underestimated him.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: How can you protect and serve the people...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you have to constantly look over your shoulder when you're around them?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If we don't neutralize this "cross guild" group soon...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This will kill the morale of every marine and weaken the whole navy.

dialogue.speaker: Kuzan
dialogue.text: Hey, Hina! Have you seen GARP?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I have a lot of information about

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There's a new rice cracker flavor I want him to try.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He said he was "off to save Koby" a few days ago...

dialogue.speaker: Garp
dialogue.text: So he's probably teamed up with sword.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Pretty sure Kijaku's with him at least.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: What?!

dialogue.speaker: Garp
dialogue.text: Don't tell me they've gone to Hachinosu?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Emptee Bluffs Island, New World

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Good job crossing the seas and making it here!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Thank you...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Be proud! The emporors of the underworld are smiling because of '1011'

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Everyone is proclaiming the birth of a new star! A champion of evil!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I heard my family received the payment...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Thank you so much.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't mention it! You took down one of Navy Ho's finest Vice Admirals!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You're "evil Charisma" Ingarnate! Stop being so humble!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Gya ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: Your crazy stunt really shocked the Marines!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They'll have your head for sure if they catch you!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: ACK!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: EVEN IF I CAN'T SEE MY FAMILY EVER AGAIN...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It’s better than watching them die of starvation...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I'm so hungry...

summary: This part advances the Cross Guild and Reverie Truth through 46 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
